Release Candidate Dashboard Source

The release candidate uses one dashboard repository: the live Python operations dashboard captured from the mining host.

Canonical Repository

BlockdagEngineering/dashboard2 branch main is the dashboard source for stack release builds.

Stack Packaging Rule

The stack repository owns the node, pool, Docker, installer, and chain-sync release candidate. Any dashboard/control-plane import from the dashboard repository must pass the stack hardening validator before it can be packaged.

One Dashboard Source

Do not add fallback dashboard repositories, prototype dashboards, or observability dashboard source trees to this release path. The ops/observability tree must stay out of this RC path.
